expectations.text: An architecture diagram was included (ASCII art or Mermaid)
A library choices or comparison table was included
expectations.evidence: Library table found: ['| library', '| need', '| alternatives', 'library choices']

expectations.text: A testing strategy section was included with test types
expectations.evidence: Testing strategy present: ['testing strategy', 'unit test', 'integration test', 'end-to-end', 'edge case']

expectations.text: Tasks are concrete with file paths or function names
A coherence or logic review was mentioned or performed
The spec has multiple phases with status markers
